title: Multicolor Birthday Girl Prism Banner (3.6 Meters) 1 Piece - Celebration Party Decorative Banner
features: BIRTHDAY GIRL PRISM BANNER: Make your little one's special day unforgettable with this vibrant and eye-catching birthday girl prism banner, designed to add a festive touch to any celebration and create lasting memories.

MULTICOLOR DESIGN: Featuring a stunning multicolor design, this party decorative banner is sure to brighten up your space and bring smiles to everyone's faces - ensuring a memorable birthday party for your child.

IMPRESSIVE SIZE: Measuring a generous 3.6 meters, this birthday banner is long enough to stretch across rooms or yards, making it perfect for indoor or outdoor celebrations and versatile enough to suit any party setup.

HASSLE-FREE DECORATION: No need to struggle with multiple strands and clips, this 1-piece banner is hassle-free - making party decor a breeze! Attach it to walls, tables, or outdoor fences, and focus on enjoying the special day.
IDEAL FOR CELEBRATION PARTIES: This multicolor birthday girl prism banner is perfect for all your party decoration needs - be it a small gathering or a grand event.
description: Product Description Make your celebration special with eye-catching an banner with our Prismatic Foil "Birthday Girl" Banner. 1 Birthday Banner - 12 ft. This prismatic banner features a pink "Birthday Girl" headline on a silver background with colorful flower designs. This disposable prismatic banner is perfect for celebrating fun birthday parties. Made of durable foil material, this prismatic banner is very eye catching with high quality prints. This product is easy to assemble, install, and can be stored and re-used. Box Contains 1 x Banner
